author: deepak.rao
message: perf: reuse sync.Pool for buffers in encoder
diff:
@@ pkg/codec/pool.go @@
+var bufPool = sync.Pool{New: func() any { return new(bytes.Buffer) }}
 	b := bufPool.Get().(*bytes.Buffer)
+	defer bufPool.Put(b)

author: ivan.petrov
message: chore(inventory): tune pgx pool idle settings
diff:
@@ services/inventory/db/pool.go @@
 	cfg := db.NewPoolConfig()
-	cfg.MaxConnIdleTime = 30 * time.Second
+	cfg.MaxConnIdleTime = 5 * time.Minute
-	cfg.HealthCheckPeriod = 15 * time.Second
+	cfg.HealthCheckPeriod = 60 * time.Second
@@ services/inventory/config/db.yaml @@
-  max_conn_idle: 30s
+  max_conn_idle: 5m
-  health_check_period: 15s
+  health_check_period: 60s
